summary: Reposted Newsmax 'National Report' segment. A studio anchor speaks at left while a picture-in-picture at right shows a man holding documents outdoors. A lower-third reads 'FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD,' with a 'LIVE' tag and a news ticker. The audio describes a federal fraud task force. The tweet text quotes the Labor Department Inspector General warning fraudsters.

script.scene: Newsmax studio anchor at left with a picture-in-picture of a man holding documents at right; chyron 'FEDS DEFER MORE MEDICAID FUNDING TO MN OVER FRAUD.'
